observations.summary: Sanctioned Go unit path (scripts/runtime/go-unit.sh) runs 'go test ./...' without -race, so the data-race-detector evidence the two prior chaos probes relied on is not reproducible through the repo CLI. Not a runtime destabilizer of spec 023 surfaces; the races dimension is evidenced structurally (3 prior race guards intact via grep) plus green concurrency regression tests.

executionHistory.summary: Created spec.md from engineering review findings. 3 actors, 4 use cases, 9 business scenarios, 9 requirements (1 high, 6 medium, 2 low). Outcome contract defined. No competitive analysis (internal quality feature).

Created design.md covering all 9 findings: sync.Once for mlClient race, SST-compliant connector config fields, 5 typed interfaces replacing interface{}, dead checkAuth removal, writeJSON in intelligence handlers, Ollama health probe via GET /api/tags, Telegram bot health interface, structuredLogger path exclusion, config-driven sync_schedule parsing. No new dependencies. No API contract changes.

Manual cross-check verified spec implementation files exist on disk: internal/api/health.go (448 lines, 6 typed interfaces Pipeliner/Searcher/DigestGenerator/WebUI/OAuthFlow/TelegramHealthChecker, mlClientOnce sync.Once), internal/api/router.go (309 lines, structuredLogger excludes /api/health, /ping, /readyz, /metrics), internal/api/capture.go (writeJSON+writeError helpers), internal/api/intelligence.go (160 lines, all handlers use writeJSON), internal/connector/supervisor.go (475 lines, getSyncInterval at line 399 replaces hardcoded 5min), cmd/core/connectors.go (cfg.BookmarksImportDir/BrowserHistoryPath/MapsImportDir from config.Config, zero os.Getenv). go test passes for api/connector/config packages including -race for TestMLClient_ConcurrentAccess.

cross_spec_trace_guard_remediation_via_per_class_fixes (Iter 9): Added concrete file paths to scope 1/2/3 Test Plan rows (internal/api/health_test.go, internal/api/router.go, internal/api/capture.go, internal/api/intelligence_test.go, internal/config/validate_test.go, internal/connector/sync_interval_test.go); tagged DoD bullets for SCN-023-01/02/04/06/07 with 'Scenario SCN-023-NN (title):' prefix; appended trace-guard remediation section to report.md describing coverage in internal/config/validate_test.go, internal/api/intelligence_test.go, internal/connector/sync_interval_test.go. trace-guard PASSED (0 warnings).

OPS-002 G088 recert. Reviewed post-cert planning edits: 6860f5b8 (scopes.md — trace-guard DoD-prefix 'Scenario SCN-023-NN:' on existing bullets + Test Plan file-path corrections citing existing health_test.go/router_test.go/etc.; category b), fb2a4266 (design.md — 'Design Successor Note' that spec 067 augments the quality-guard catalog; note states 023 'stays done' and 'remain authoritative'; category b), 8cd272dc (scopes.md — single broken path 'internal/api/interfaces.go' rewritten to actual landing site internal/api/health.go; that commit's spec-060 doc-presence tests landed in spec 060, not 023; category b). No post-promotion requirement/scenario/DoD semantic change; implementation unchanged. certifiedAt advanced to 2026-06-06T17:00:00Z for Gate G088.

reconcile-to-doc phase-record reconciliation (Gate G022 phase-record drift). Migrated 3 genuinely-completed phases into execution/certification phase records with citable anchors: regression — report.md section 'Regression Sweep (2026-04-12, regression trigger)' (8-check invariant verification table, cross-spec conflict analysis of 7 files, ./smackerel.sh check + ./smackerel.sh test unit pass, zero findings); simplify — commit 96ad78f3 (trigger=simplify, mappedMode=simplify-to-doc) which extracted probeHTTPGet at internal/api/health.go:644 and produced bugs/BUG-023-002-health-probe-dedup (status done); security — report.md sections 'Security Scan (2026-04-21)' and 'Security Scan — Repeat (2026-04-30)' (bubbles.security, 14 OWASP checks each, clean). stabilize NOT recorded — zero report.md occurrences and no spec-023-attributed commit; the only stabilize commits (d4dd693a, 8b928995) attribute stabilize work to ingestion/ops/weather while naming engquality only for other phases (evidence of absence). Routed to bubbles.stabilize. artifact-lint 9 to 3 issues (residual = stabilize real-work-needed). No protected artifacts (spec.md/design.md/scopes.md) touched; no requirement/scenario/DoD semantics changed.

Genuine stabilize sweep recorded from report.md section 'Stabilize Pass — reconcile-to-doc (2026-06-08)' (authored by bubbles.stabilize; routed here by the 2026-06-08 reconcile because no prior stabilize sweep had run against spec 023 surfaces). Verdict STABLE — 0 destabilizers across races/leaks/resource-bounds/shutdown/timing for spec 023 surfaces (internal/api/health.go, internal/api/router.go, internal/connector/supervisor.go, internal/connector/imap/imap.go). Evidence: 5 sanctioned-CLI blocks — structural grep of 3 intact race guards (mlClient sync.Once, IMAP mu RWMutex, supervisor post-delay stopped RLock); supervisor shutdown/panic-recovery/sync-overflow tests (internal/connector ok 20.871s; bounded 10s drain + 'skipping restart — supervisor stopped during delay'); health concurrency/cache tests (internal/api ok 1.654s); IMAP concurrent-sync regression (internal/connector/imap ok 0.026s); ./smackerel.sh check exit 0 (Config in sync with SST; scenario-lint 16 registered/0 rejected). 1 low-severity advisory recorded not routed (OBS-023-STAB-01: CLI go-unit path lacks -race). No code change; no protected artifact (spec.md/design.md/scopes.md) touched; 023 stays done. Phase record written by bubbles.validate.

statusDiscipline.scopePickupRule: All dependsOn scopes must be Done. Pick the lowest-numbered eligible scope.
statusDiscipline.specDoneRequires: All scopes done. certification.completedScopes contains all scope IDs and bubbles.validate has certified promotion.

notes: Initialized from engineering review findings. 9 requirements mapped to codebase evidence.
